# Rack-N-Roll v1.2.0 Story Cards

Branch: `production/v1.2.0`  
Target release: v1.2.0  
Cadence: one story per branch commit + push; merge when milestone acceptance passes.

## Product decisions (locked)

| Topic | Decision |
|-------|----------|
| Public scoresheet | Yes — read-only for guests; edits still host/proctor only |
| Auth gate UX | Popup modal on gated actions (Register, Host, etc.) |
| Google-only accounts | No password at signup; password set separately in Profile if user chooses |
| Logging | Structured Pino logs to stdout (Render/Railway); defer Sentry until post-v1.2.0 unless needed |
| Cache policy | **Conservative** — short stale times on live tournament data; longer on discover/profile |

---

## Milestone V12-M0 — Security baseline

### Story V12-S0.1: Dependency audit + CI gate

**Objective:** Zero critical/high npm vulnerabilities; CI blocks new ones.

**Scope:** `frontend/package-lock.json`, `.github/workflows/dependency-audit.yml`

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Run `npm audit fix` in frontend
- [ ] Confirm backend audit clean
- [ ] Add GitHub Actions workflow for both packages
- [ ] Extend CI triggers to `production/v1.2.0` pushes

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: `npm audit --audit-level=high` exits 0 in both packages
- Failure: CI fails when critical vulnerability introduced
- Auth: N/A

**Deliverables:** Clean audit report, CI workflow file

---

### Story V12-S0.2: HTTP hardening (helmet + rate limits)

**Objective:** Protect auth endpoints from brute force; add standard security headers.

**Scope:** `backend/src/app.js`, `backend/src/middleware/rateLimiters.js`, `backend/src/routes/auth.routes.js`

**Rules:**
- Rate limits return 429 with existing error shape
- Do not log passwords or tokens
- Health route exempt from strict limits

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Add `helmet` middleware globally
- [ ] Add auth rate limiter (10 req / 15 min / IP on login, signup, forgot-password)
- [ ] Wire limiters on `/api/auth/*`
- [ ] Integration tests still pass

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: Normal auth flow works
- Failure: 11th login attempt in window returns 429
- Auth: Existing JWT flows unchanged

---

## Milestone V12-M1 — Structured logging

### Story V12-S1.1: Backend Pino logger + request IDs

**Objective:** Every API request and error is traceable via `X-Request-Id`.

**Scope:** `backend/src/utils/logger.js`, `backend/src/middleware/requestId.js`, `backend/src/middleware/requestLogger.js`, `backend/src/middleware/errorHandler.js`, `backend/src/app.js`

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Add `pino` + `pino-http`
- [ ] Request ID middleware (UUID, echo in response header)
- [ ] Log all requests (method, path, status, duration, userId)
- [ ] Log 4xx ApiErrors at warn; 5xx at error
- [ ] Never log passwords, JWT, reset PINs

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: Response includes `X-Request-Id`
- Failure: 404/401 appear in logs with requestId
- Auth: Invalid token logged without token value

---

### Story V12-S1.2: Frontend error logger + silent catch fixes

**Objective:** No swallowed API errors; dev-friendly structured logging.

**Scope:** `frontend/src/utils/errorLogger.js`, `frontend/src/services/api.js`, `AuthContext.js`, `TournamentDetailScreen.js`, `ScoresheetScreen.js`

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Add errorLogger utility
- [ ] Hook api.js response interceptor
- [ ] Replace empty catches with log + graceful fallback
- [ ] Use `formatApiError` consistently where missing

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: Failed API call logs code + message in __DEV__
- Failure: No unhandled promise rejections on tab refresh
- Auth: Bootstrap token clear logs at warn level

---

## Milestone V12-M2 — Public home + gated actions

### Story V12-S2.1: Public read API routes

**Objective:** Guests can browse discovery and scoresheet without JWT.

**Scope:** `backend/src/routes/tournament.routes.js`, `backend/src/services/tournament.service.js`, integration tests

**Rules:**
- Remove `requireAuth` from discover, scoresheet, public standings
- `canEdit` false when userId is null
- All write routes keep `requireAuth`

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] `GET /discover` public
- [ ] `GET /:id/scoresheet` public (read-only for guests)
- [ ] `GET /:id/groups/standings` public read
- [ ] Optional: `POST validate-invite-code` public
- [ ] Integration tests for unauthenticated 200 on reads, 401 on writes

---

### Story V12-S2.2: Unified navigator + auth prompt modal

**Objective:** App opens to Home for everyone; gated actions show sign-in popup.

**Scope:** `AppNavigator.js`, `HomeScreen.js`, new `AuthPromptModal.js`, `useRequireAuth.js`, `SignInScreen.js`, `SignUpScreen.js`

**Rules:**
- Popup offers Sign in / Sign up / Cancel
- Post-login navigates to `returnTo` target
- Guest header: Sign in / Sign up; authed: profile + sign out

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Merge AuthStack + AppStack into RootStack (Home initial)
- [ ] AuthPromptModal component
- [ ] useRequireAuth hook
- [ ] HomeScreen guest mode (browse, gate register/host)
- [ ] ScoresheetScreen guest read-only
- [ ] returnTo param on SignIn/SignUp

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: Guest opens app → sees tournaments
- Failure: Guest register → popup → sign in → can register
- Auth: Guest cannot POST registration without token (401 from API)

---

## Milestone V12-M3 — API caching (React Query)

### Story V12-S3.1: QueryClient setup + discover cache

**Objective:** Home feed uses TanStack Query with conservative stale times.

**Scope:** `frontend/App.js`, `frontend/src/hooks/queries/useDiscoverTournaments.js`, `HomeScreen.js`

**Cache policy (conservative):**
| Query | staleTime |
|-------|-----------|
| discover | 2 min |
| scoresheet | 15 sec |
| standings | 30 sec |
| host-detail | 30 sec |
| profile | 5 min |
| live match | 0 (no cache) |

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Add `@tanstack/react-query`
- [ ] QueryClientProvider in App.js
- [ ] Migrate HomeScreen discover fetch
- [ ] Pull-to-refresh → invalidateQueries
- [ ] Registration mutation invalidates discover

---

### Story V12-S3.2: Tournament + scoresheet query migration

**Objective:** TournamentDetail and Scoresheet use cached reads with mutation invalidation.

**Scope:** Query hooks, `TournamentDetailScreen.js`, `ScoresheetScreen.js`, `ProfileScreen.js`, mutation wrappers

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] useTournamentScoresheet, useGroupStandings, useHostDetail, useMyProfile
- [ ] Score update mutations invalidate scoresheet + standings
- [ ] Host actions invalidate host-detail + registrations
- [ ] Live match excluded from cache

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: Revisit Home within 2 min → no network (unless refresh)
- Failure: Score update → standings refresh on next view
- Auth: Guest queries work without token on public endpoints

---

## Milestone V12-M4 — Google OAuth

### Story V12-S4.1: User model + Google auth backend

**Objective:** Sign in with Google; Google-only users have no password until set in Profile.

**Scope:** `user.model.js`, `auth.service.js`, `auth.controller.js`, `auth.routes.js`, `user.service.js`

**Rules:**
- `authProvider`: `local` | `google`
- `passwordHash` required only when `authProvider === 'local'`
- `googleId` sparse unique index
- Same email: link Google to existing local account OR reject with clear message (document policy)
- Verify idToken server-side with `google-auth-library`

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Extend User schema
- [ ] `POST /api/auth/google` endpoint
- [ ] Env: `GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`
- [ ] Integration test with mocked token verify

---

### Story V12-S4.2: Google sign-in UI + Profile password setup

**Objective:** "Continue with Google" on SignIn/SignUp; Profile section to set password for Google users.

**Scope:** `SignInScreen.js`, `SignUpScreen.js`, `ProfileScreen.js`, `authService.js`, `AuthContext.js`, expo-auth-session

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] expo-auth-session + expo-web-browser
- [ ] Google button on auth screens
- [ ] Profile: "Set password" for google provider (calls new backend endpoint)
- [ ] Google users cannot use forgot-password until password set

**Acceptance tests:**
- Happy: Google sign-in creates account, returns JWT
- Failure: Invalid idToken rejected
- Auth: Google user login via password fails until password set in Profile

---

## Milestone V12-M5 — Credential security

### Story V12-S5.1: SecureStore + shorter JWT

**Objective:** Tokens stored securely on device; reduced JWT exposure window.

**Scope:** `tokenStore.js`, `backend/.env.example`, `auth.service.js`, Profile password endpoint from S4.2

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] Migrate token storage to `expo-secure-store`
- [ ] Document `JWT_EXPIRES_IN=24h` for production
- [ ] Optional: refresh token (defer if scope tight)

---

### Story V12-S5.2: Account lockout + enumeration hardening

**Objective:** Brute-force login mitigation; reduce email enumeration on signup.

**Scope:** `user.model.js`, `auth.service.js`

**Implementation checklist:**
- [ ] `failedLoginAttempts` + `lockoutUntil` on User
- [ ] Lock after 5 failures for 15 min
- [ ] Signup duplicate email: generic response option (document tradeoff)

---

## Logging recommendation (decision #4)

**Ship v1.2.0 with: Pino → stdout only.**

| Option | Pros | Cons |
|--------|------|------|
| **Stdout / Pino (recommended now)** | Free, works on Render/Railway, structured JSON, request ID correlation, no new vendor | No mobile crash reports; must open host logs manually |
| **Sentry (add later)** | Mobile crashes, breadcrumbs, alerts | Extra setup, privacy review, cost at scale |
| **Both** | Best observability | More complexity for v1.2.0 scope |

Add Sentry in v1.2.1 if users report issues you cannot reproduce.

---

## Cache recommendation (decision #5)

**Ship v1.2.0 with: conservative stale times.**

| Policy | staleTime examples | Pros | Cons |
|--------|-------------------|------|------|
| **Conservative (recommended)** | discover 2m, scoresheet 15s, standings 30s | Fresh scores during live events; fewer "wrong score" complaints | More API calls than aggressive |
| **Aggressive** | discover 5–10m, scoresheet 2m | Fewer calls, snappier revisits | Stale standings during active scoring; hosts see old data |

Tournament apps have **live score updates** — conservative cache with strong invalidation on mutations is the right default. Pull-to-refresh always bypasses cache.
